options.content:
# Juddges — LLM Cost — not yet wired up

**Blocked:** Token/cost figures live in Langfuse; no Prometheus/SQL export is wired up. LangChain cache hit-rate also depends on the LANGCHAIN_CACHE_DATABASE_URL issue landing.

### Intended tiles
- OpenAI tokens/day by model
- Cost/day estimate
- LangChain cache hit rate (blocked on cache env-var issue)

### What it needs
Export Langfuse usage to Postgres (scheduled sync) or enable Langfuse's Prometheus endpoint, then point panels at it. Follow-up to #196.

_This placeholder is committed so the dashboard set is complete and reviewable; it renders cleanly (text only) and carries no panels that would error against a datasource that does not exist yet._
